info.title: Bzzoiro Sports Data API
info.description: Free REST API for football data and ML predictions. Access leagues, teams, events, live scores, odds, player stats, and CatBoost-powered match predictions across 30+ leagues.

get.description:
**DEPRECATED.** Use `/api/v2/broadcasts/` instead. Migration mapping:
- `event=X` → `event_id=X`
- `country=X` → `country_code=X` (ISO-2)
- `channel=X` → `channel_id=X` — refers to **internal** TVChannel PK in v2 (v1 used the upstream channel_id).
- `league=X` → `league_id=X`
- `date_from`/`date_to` → ISO-8601 UTC (YYYY-MM-DD still accepted, documented as date-time).
- Response now includes `home_team_id`, `away_team_id`, `league_id` alongside the existing labels (id+label pattern).
- v2 adds pagination (`limit`/`offset`), a detail endpoint, plus the sub-resources `/api/v2/events/{event_id}/broadcasts/` and `/api/v2/tv-channels/{channel_id}/broadcasts/`.

This endpoint will be removed in a future release.

Returns event-to-channel broadcast mappings — which licensed TV channel shows which match, in which country, and at what scheduled start time. Only official rights-holders are ingested — no pirate streams. Filter by `?event=`, `?country=`, `?channel=` (internal channel ID), `?league=`, `?date_from=` / `?date_to=` (YYYY-MM-DD on the event date). Default ordering is by scheduled_start_time.
get.summary: List official match broadcasts per country

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: Filter by event ID

Returns football matches with odds and basic info. Defaults to the next 7 days when no date filters are provided. Spatial fields (lineups, shotmap, momentum, average_positions) are excluded by default — add ?full=true to include them.

parameters.description: Filter matches on or after this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: date_to
parameters.description: Filter matches on or before this date (YYYY-MM-DD)

parameters.name: full
parameters.description: Include spatial data (lineups, shotmap, momentum, average_positions). Default: false.

parameters.name: league
parameters.description: Filter by league ID

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of results to return per page.

parameters.name: offset
parameters.description: The initial index from which to return the results.

parameters.name: season
parameters.description: Filter by season ID (from /api/seasons/). Bypasses the default 7-day window — returns all matches in that season.

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by status: notstarted, inprogress, finished, postponed, cancelled

parameters.name: team
parameters.description: Filter by team name (partial match, case-insensitive)

parameters.name: team_id
parameters.description: Filter by team ID — returns matches where the team played home or away (exact match)

parameters.name: tz
parameters.description: IANA timezone for date localisation (e.g. Europe/London). Defaults to UTC.

Returns head coaches and managers with their tactical profile and aggregated match statistics. Filter by team, tactical style, or minimum matches managed. Supports free-text search by name and ordering by performance metrics. Cached for 1 hour.

parameters.name: min_matches
parameters.description: Minimum number of matches managed (default: 0)

parameters.name: ordering
parameters.description: Sort field — prefix with - for descending. Options: win_pct, avg_goals_scored, avg_goals_conceded, matches_total, avg_yellow_cards, name. Example: -win_pct

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: profile
parameters.description: Filter by tactical profile: attacking, defensive, balanced

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Case-insensitive search across name and short_name fields

parameters.name: team_id
parameters.description: Filter by team ID — returns the manager with an active tenure at that club

parameters.name: team_style
parameters.description: Filter by playing style: possession, counter, pressing, defensive, direct, mixed

get.description:
**DEPRECATED.** Use `/api/v2/odds/` instead. Migration mapping:
- `event=X` → `event_id=X`
- `league=X` → `league_id=X`
- `bookmaker=X` → `bookmaker_slug=X` (slug only — display name no longer accepted)
- When `?event=ID` was used, v1 returned an envelope shape. v2 always returns the standard paginated shape. For event-scoped comparison use `/api/v2/events/{id}/odds/comparison/`.
- Default market filter changed from `1x2` to all markets.
- Incoherent market+outcome combinations now return 400 instead of empty results.

This endpoint will be removed in a future release.

Returns odds snapshots from 22+ bookmakers. When the `event` filter is used, returns a single-event envelope: `{event: {id, home_team, away_team, event_date, league}, count, odds: [...]}`. Without `event`, returns a standard paginated list of odds snapshots. Default market filter is `1x2` — use `?market=all` or a specific market code to override.

parameters.name: bookmaker
parameters.description: Filter by bookmaker name or code (e.g. bet365)

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: Event ID — when set, wraps response in an event context object and returns all odds unpaginated

parameters.name: league
parameters.description: Filter by league ID

parameters.name: market
parameters.description: Odds market code: 1x2, over_under_15, over_under_25, over_under_35, btts, double_chance. Defaults to 1x2.

parameters.name: outcome
parameters.description: Filter by outcome code: HOME, DRAW, AWAY, over, under, yes, no

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

get.description: Returns one odds snapshot record by ID, including decimal odds and line movement.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Odds snapshot ID

get.description:

- `days=N` → `date_from=now`, `date_to=now+N days` (or pass an explicit `date_from`/`date_to` pair).

Returns the highest available odds per outcome across all bookmakers for upcoming matches. Useful for finding value bets — each outcome shows the best decimal odds and which bookmaker offers them. Defaults to the 1x2 market and the next 3 days.

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Number of days ahead to scan (default: 3, max: 7)

parameters.name: league
parameters.description: Filter by league ID

parameters.name: market
parameters.description: Market code (default: 1x2). E.g. over_under_25, btts.

Returns all bookmaker odds for a single event, grouped by market and outcome. Each outcome shows the best available odds and a per-bookmaker breakdown with decimal odds and line movement. Requires the `event` parameter.
get.summary: Compare bookmaker odds for an event

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: BSD internal event ID (required). Use /api/events/ to look up events — do NOT use external provider IDs (api_id).

parameters.name: market
parameters.description: Filter by market code (e.g. 1x2, over_under_25, btts). Omit to return all markets.

get.description:
DEPRECATED. Use `/api/v2/events/{event_id}/lineups/` instead. The v2 endpoint unifies official confirmed lineups and AI-predicted lineups under a single URL with a `lineup_status` discriminator (`unavailable` | `predicted` | `confirmed`). The `beta: true` flag from v1 is replaced by `lineup_status: predicted`.

Field mapping:
- `lineups.{home,away}.team` → `lineups.{home,away}.team_name`
- `lineups.{home,away}.predicted_formation` → `lineups.{home,away}.formation`
- `confidence` (0–100) → `lineups.{home,away}.confidence` (0–1)
- `starters` → `lineups.{home,away}.players`
- `bench` → `lineups.{home,away}.substitutes`
- `404` when not generated → `200` with `lineup_status: unavailable`

This endpoint will be removed in a future release.

**DEPRECATED.** Use `/api/v2/predictions/` instead. Migration mapping:
- `upcoming=true` → `status=upcoming` (default)
- `upcoming=false` → `status=past`
- `league=X` → `league_id=X`
- `tz=…` → not supported, all datetimes returned in UTC (Z)
- Response shape changed: fields are now grouped under `markets`, `recommendations`, `model`. See `/api/v2/predictions/` docs.

This endpoint will be removed in a future release.

parameters.name: upcoming

- `/api/seasons/?league=X&current=true` → `/api/v2/leagues/X/season/`

This endpoint will be removed in a future release.

get.description:
**DEPRECATED.** No direct v2 replacement. To resolve a `season_id` returned by other endpoints (e.g. event.season_id), use the parent league's sub-resources: `/api/v2/leagues/{league_id}/seasons/` and filter client-side by ID. This endpoint will be removed in a future release.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Season ID

get.description:
**DEPRECATED.** Use `/api/v2/social/` instead. Migration mapping:
- `team=X` → `team_id=X`
- `event=X` → `event_id=X`
- `player=X` → `player_id=X` (still heuristic linking)
- `manager=X` → `manager_id=X`
- `since=X` → `published_after=X` (ISO 8601 UTC)
- `source` field → removed (vendor name no longer exposed)
- `media_urls` → `media` (normalized: `[{type, url, width, height}]`)
- `account_handle`/`account_name`/`account_verified` → grouped under `account` object
- `teams`/`events`/`players`/`managers` arrays → grouped under `linked` object
- v2 adds detail endpoint `/api/v2/social/{id}/` and entity-scoped sub-resources (`/teams/{id}/social/`, `/events/{id}/social/`, `/players/{id}/social/`, `/managers/{id}/social/`).
- v2 adds pagination (`limit`/`offset`).
- v2 excludes `news` items — only `tweet` and `video` are returned.

This endpoint will be removed in a future release.

Returns a blended feed of three item types:
 - **tweet** — posts from official club Twitter accounts
 - **video** — YouTube match-highlight videos
 - **news** — editorial articles from third-party football news sources
Each item carries M2M links to the teams it was pulled from plus heuristic links to the current-squad players, current manager, and nearby match (±36h of publish time) for that team. Tweets refresh every 30 minutes, highlights every 6 hours, news every hour.
get.summary: List social items (tweets, video highlights, news) linked to teams, events, players or managers

parameters.name: event
parameters.description: Filter by event ID

parameters.name: manager
parameters.description: Filter by manager ID

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: A page number within the paginated result set.

parameters.name: player
parameters.description: Filter by player ID

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: ISO date — only items published on/after this date

parameters.name: team
parameters.description: Filter by team ID

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: "tweet", "video", or "news"

get.description: Social items (tweets, video highlights, news) linked to entities.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: A unique integer value identifying this social item.

Unified lineups endpoint covering three states via the `lineup_status` discriminator:

- `confirmed` — official XI published by the club. Available ~1 hour before kickoff and persists after the match. `confidence` and `ai_score` are always `null` in this state.
- `predicted` — AI-generated lineup with `confidence` and per-player `ai_score` (both 0–1, four decimals). Only served for matches that have not started. The `beta: true` flag is set only in this state.
- `unavailable` — no lineup data yet; `lineups`, `unavailable_players` and `updated_at` are all null. The response is still 200, not 404.

Selection priority: confirmed > predicted > unavailable. Live and finished matches never receive predicted, even if predictions exist in the database.

Replaces the v1 endpoint `/api/predicted-lineup/{id}/`.

Paginated list of latest odds across bookmakers. Each item is one (event, bookmaker, market, outcome) tuple at its most recent observation. Standard v2 wrapper (count + next + previous + results). Cached 3 min.

When no event_id/league_id/season_id/team_id or updated_after filter is given, results default to the last 48h of observations (the meaningful "latest odds" window). Pass an explicit updated_after to widen it.

Market+outcome compatibility (incoherent combos return 400):
- 1x2            → HOME, DRAW, AWAY
- btts           → yes, no
- over_under_15/25/35 → over, under
- double_chance  → 1X, 12, X2
- draw_no_bet    → HOME, AWAY
- total_corners  → over, under (line in `line` field)
- corners_1x2    → HOME, DRAW, AWAY (which team has more corners)
- total_red_cards → over, under (line in `line` field)
- red_card       → yes, no (a red card is shown in the match)

For total_corners/total_red_cards the handicap line varies per quote and is returned in the `line` field (null for all other markets).

For event-scoped side-by-side comparison use `/api/v2/events/{id}/odds/comparison/`.

The v2 endpoint unifies official confirmed lineups and AI-predicted lineups under a single URL with a `lineup_status` discriminator (`unavailable` | `predicted` | `confirmed`). The `beta: true` flag from v1 is replaced by `lineup_status: predicted`.

Field mapping:
- `lineups.{home,away}.team` → `lineups.{home,away}.team_name`
- `lineups.{home,away}.predicted_formation` → `lineups.{home,away}.formation`
- `confidence` (0–100) → `lineups.{home,away}.confidence` (0–1)
- `starters` → `lineups.{home,away}.players`
- `bench` → `lineups.{home,away}.substitutes`
- `404` when not generated → `200` with `lineup_status: unavailable`

This endpoint will be removed in a future release.

parameters.description: Snapshot date (YYYY-MM-DD). Default: latest.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Default 50, max 500.

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: ATP (default) or WTA.

get.description: Paginated tennis tournaments. Active-only by default. Filter by circuit (ATP/WTA), category (grand_slam, masters_1000, atp_500, …) or surface.

parameters.name: category
parameters.description: grand_slam, masters_1000, atp_500, atp_250, wta_1000, wta_500, wta_250.

parameters.name: circuit
parameters.description: ATP or WTA (case-insensitive).

parameters.name: include_inactive
parameters.description: Set true to include inactive tournaments.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Default 50, max 200.

parameters.name: surface
parameters.description: hard, clay, grass, carpet.

get.description:
GET /tipsters/api/slips/
Returns the authenticated user's last 20 slips with tips.

post.description:
POST /tipsters/api/tips/
Submit a new slip with 1–8 tips.

POST /tipsters/api/wom/
Submit Weight-of-Money movements for one or more events.
Each movement must reference a valid future football or tennis event in our DB.

away_score_ht.description: Away goals at half-time (derived from incidents)

actual_away_xg.description: Actual away team xG (post-match, from player stats)

away_xg_live.description: Away team total xG (live from shotmap, or post-match fallback)

penalty_shootout.description: Penalty shootout result: {home: X, away: Y} if a shootout occurred, null otherwise

extra_time_score.description: Goals scored in extra time only: {home: X, away: Y}. Non-null when status is aet or penalties. The home_score/away_score fields always reflect the result after 90 minutes.

is_local_derby.description: True when the two teams share a city/region. Null = unknown.

is_neutral_ground.description: True when played on neutral ground (cup finals, internationals).

travel_distance_km.description: Distance between team home cities in km

referee.description: Referee info: name, yellowCards, redCards (null if unavailable)

unavailable_players.description: Players unavailable for this match: injured, suspended, or doubtful (grouped by team)

venue.description: Match venue (stadium). Uses the event-specific venue when available; falls back to the home team's home stadium. Null only when neither is set. To detect neutral-ground matches compare venue.id with home_team_obj.venue.id.

incidents.description: Match incidents: goals, cards, substitutions. Each item: {type, minute, player_name, is_home, ...}. Requires ?full=true.

live_stats.description: Match statistics: {home: {ball_possession, total_shots, shots_on_target, corner_kicks, fouls, yellow_cards, red_cards, offsides, expected_goals, ...}, away: {...}}. Available both during the match and after full time.

lineups.description: Team lineups with player positions. Each item: {player_name, position, x, y, is_home}. Included only when ?full=true is set on the list endpoint, or always on GET /api/events/{id}/.

shotmap.description: All shots in the match. Each item: {min, type, sit, body, home, xg, xgot, pos: {x,y}, gm: {y,z}, gml, pid}. Requires ?full=true on both the list endpoint and GET /api/events/{id}/.

momentum.description: Minute-by-minute pressure index. Each item: {m: minute (int), v: pressure (signed int, positive = home dominance, negative = away)}. Requires ?full=true on both the list endpoint and GET /api/events/{id}/.

xg_per_minute.description: Per-minute xG buckets aggregated from the shotmap. Each item: {m: minute (int), xg_home: xG added by home this minute, xg_away: xG added by away this minute, cum_home: cumulative home xG up to and including this minute, cum_away: cumulative away xG}. Useful for in-play momentum models (delta xG/min) without paginating the shotmap. Requires ?full=true on both the list endpoint and GET /api/events/{id}/.

average_positions.description: Average pitch positions per player during the match. Structure: {home: [{player, pid, pos: {x,y}, number}], away: [...]}. Requires ?full=true on both the list endpoint and GET /api/events/{id}/.

jerseys.description: {home: {player, GK}, away: {...}} colours used in the match

funfacts.description: Pre-match facts: list of {sentence, type_id}. Set ~24h before KO.

sr_stats.description: Provider-only counters at full time: ball_safe, attack, dangerous_attack (+ percentage variants). Each value: {home, away}.

ai_preview.description: AI-generated match preview text (markdown). Returns null if no preview has been generated yet. Generated for fixtures kicking off in the next 24h.

lineup_status.description:
`confirmed` — official XI published by the club (≈1h before kickoff). `predicted` — AI-generated, only served for matches that have not started. `unavailable` — no lineup data; `lineups`, `unavailable_players` and `updated_at` are all null.

* `unavailable` - unavailable
* `predicted` - predicted
* `confirmed` - confirmed

beta.description: Always present. `true` only when `lineup_status` is `predicted` — confirmed lineups are not beta.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC ending in `Z`. Null when `lineup_status` is `unavailable`.

home_xg_live.description: Home team total xG so far in the match (sum of per-shot xG from shotmap). Updates in real time alongside the shotmap. Null when no shots have been logged yet.

away_xg_live.description: Away team total xG so far in the match (sum of per-shot xG from shotmap). Updates in real time alongside the shotmap. Null when no shots have been logged yet.

momentum.description: Minute-by-minute pressure index. Each item: {m: minute (int), v: pressure (signed int, positive = home dominance, negative = away)}. Requires ?full=true.

xg_per_minute.description: Per-minute xG buckets aggregated from the shotmap. Each item: {m: minute (int), xg_home: xG added by home this minute, xg_away: xG added by away this minute, cum_home: cumulative home xG up to and including this minute, cum_away: cumulative away xG}. market.description:
Betting market (e.g. 1x2, btts, over_under_25).

* `1x2` - 1x2
* `btts` - btts
* `over_under_15` - over_under_15
* `over_under_25` - over_under_25
* `over_under_35` - over_under_35
* `double_chance` - double_chance
* `draw_no_bet` - draw_no_bet
* `total_corners` - total_corners
* `corners_1x2` - corners_1x2
* `total_red_cards` - total_red_cards
* `red_card` - red_card

outcome.description:
Selection within the market (e.g. HOME, DRAW, AWAY, over, under, yes, no).

* `HOME` - HOME
* `DRAW` - DRAW
* `AWAY` - AWAY
* `over` - over
* `under` - under
* `yes` - yes
* `no` - no
* `1X` - 1X
* `12` - 12
* `X2` - X2

line.description: Handicap or totals line. Only set for total_corners and total_red_cards markets; null for all others.

outcome_name.description: Human-readable label for the outcome (e.g. "Over 2.5"). Null when not available.

decimal_odds.description: Current decimal odds (e.g. 1.85). Multiply by stake to get total return.

previous_decimal_odds.description: Previous odds observation before the last change. Null on first observation.

implied_probability.description: Implied win probability derived from decimal_odds (1 / decimal_odds), ignoring the overround.

movement.description:
Direction of the most recent odds move: SHORTENING (odds fell = more likely) or DRIFTING (odds rose = less likely). Empty string if unchanged.

* `SHORTENING` - SHORTENING
* `DRIFTING` - DRIFTING

is_max_quote.description: True when this is the best available price across all tracked bookmakers for this market + outcome.

updated_at.description: UTC timestamp of the last odds change (ISO 8601, Z suffix).
